title: Darth Wyyrlok (disambiguation)
content:
[[File:Wyyrlok_dynasty.jpg|210px|thumb|Two members of the Wyyrlok Bloodline, Darth Wyyrlok III and Saarai]]
There have been three known [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lords]] to bear the name '''Darth Wyyrlok''', all [[Chagrian/Legends|Chagrian]] [[voice]]s/[[Regent/Legends|regents]] of the [[One Sith]] and second only to the [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Dark Lord of the Sith]]. As all the holders of the name are direct descendants of one another, the title is seemingly hereditary.

*[[Darth Wyyrlok (I)]], [[Darth Krayt]]'s first chief lieutenant
*[[Darth Wyyrlok (II)]], Darth Krayt's second chief lieutenant
*[[Darth Wyyrlok (III)]], Darth Krayt's third chief lieutenant

As of [[137 ABY]], one other Chagrian, [[Saarai (Chagrian)|Saarai]] was expected to take the title:
*Darth Wyyrlok (IV), Darth Krayt's future chief lieutenant
